---
name: New rule request
about: Suggest a fail-open / misconfiguration / vulnerability pattern for ajar to detect
title: "[rule] "
labels: rule
---

**The insecure pattern**
Show the code pattern that should be flagged.

```python
# example of the risky code
```

**Why it is dangerous**
How an attacker abuses it.

**The safe fix**
What the code should do instead.

**Reference (optional)**
OWASP / CWE / docs link.

> Reminder: ajar is defensive. Rules detect and explain risk — never exploit it.
